---
title: "C160FINAL"
author: "Brandon Kim"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(mediation)

patients <- read_csv("patients.csv.gz")
admissions <- read_csv("admissions.csv.gz")
icustays <- read_csv("icustays.csv.gz")
omr <- read_csv("omr.csv.gz")
procedures <- read_csv("procedureevents.csv.gz")

cohort <- icustays %>% inner_join(admissions, by = c("subject_id", "hadm_id")) %>% inner_join(patients, by = "subject_id") %>% mutate(mortality = ifelse(!is.na(dod), 1, 0))

bmi_data <- omr %>% filter(result_name == "BMI (kg/m2)") %>% mutate(bmi = as.numeric(result_value)) %>% group_by(subject_id) %>% summarize(mean_bmi = mean(bmi, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% mutate(obese = ifelse(mean_bmi >= 30, 1, 0))

cohort <- cohort %>% left_join(bmi_data, by = "subject_id")

vent_data <- procedures %>% filter(itemid == 225792) %>% dplyr::select(subject_id, stay_id) %>% distinct() %>% mutate(ventilation = 1)

cohort <- cohort %>% left_join(vent_data, by = c("subject_id", "stay_id")) %>% mutate(ventilation = ifelse(is.na(ventilation), 0, 1))

final_data <- cohort %>% select(obese, mortality, ventilation, anchor_age, gender) %>% mutate(gender_num = ifelse(gender == "M", 1, 0), obese = as.numeric(obese), mortality = as.numeric(mortality), ventilation = as.numeric(ventilation), anchor_age = as.numeric(anchor_age)) %>% select(-gender) %>% na.omit() %>% as.data.frame()

med_model <- glm(ventilation ~ obese + anchor_age + gender_num, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = final_data)

out_model <- glm(mortality ~ obese + ventilation + anchor_age + gender_num, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = final_data)

med_out <- mediate(med_model, out_model, treat = "obese", mediator = "ventilation", boot = TRUE, sims = 100)

summary(med_out)
```
```{r}
elderly_data <- final_data %>% filter(anchor_age >= 65)
non_elderly_data <- final_data %>% filter(anchor_age < 65)

elderly_med_model <- glm(ventilation ~ obese + gender_num, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = elderly_data)
elderly_out_model <- glm(mortality ~ obese + ventilation + gender_num, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = elderly_data)
elderly_med_out <- mediate(elderly_med_model, elderly_out_model, treat = "obese", mediator = "ventilation", boot = TRUE, sims = 100)

non_elderly_med_model <- glm(ventilation ~ obese + gender_num, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = non_elderly_data)
non_elderly_out_model <- glm(mortality ~ obese + ventilation + gender_num, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = non_elderly_data)
non_elderly_med_out <- mediate(non_elderly_med_model, non_elderly_out_model, treat = "obese", mediator = "ventilation", boot = TRUE, sims = 100)

summary(elderly_med_out)
summary(non_elderly_med_out)
```
